name: New York State Overworld
premise: A text-first open world over New York State: towns are real population centers, roads are weighted travel edges, and quests are discovered locally instead of selected globally.

opening_registration.title: Enter Albany's Relief Compact
opening_registration.message: Rowan lays four registration cards across the municipal counter. Albany's electric grid, buses, clinics, and radio repeaters protect the dense corridor, but plowed service ends before many chartered steadings and old-boundary farms. The Relief Compact lets an independent troubleshooter carry a public emergency tag across both systems, provided the traveler names the experience, sponsor, kit, and obligation they will answer for. Your registration is permanent; the field package and relationships travel with you.

profiles.title: Road-Warden Relief Hand
profiles.summary: You have worked the unplowed miles between Albany's staffed route desks and isolated charter steadings.
profiles.preview: Contact: Hayden Hale. Skill edge: Fieldcraft 4. Value: Stewardship 4. Kit: weatherproof field kit. Funds: 12. Standing: Road Wardens +5. Knowledge: Relief Compact and winter routes. Obligation: return Hayden's winter packet with an honest account.
profiles.consequence: Rowan stamps you as a Road-Warden Relief Hand. Your Fieldcraft 4 raises Wolf-Winter's imported starting DEF floor from 3 to 4 when that quest is launched from this journey. Hayden remembers sponsoring you, you carry a weatherproof field kit, and his return-packet promise remains active.

profiles.title: Ledger Advocate
profiles.summary: You know how emergency authority, testimony, and scarce municipal aid move through Albany's public counters.
profiles.preview: Contact: Jamie Tanner. Skill edge: Mediation 4. Value: Accountability 4. Kit: sealed evidence folio. Funds: 25. Standing: Municipal Ledger +5. Knowledge: emergency ledger and Relief Compact. Obligation: return a truthful relief account to Rowan.
profiles.consequence: Rowan registers you as a Ledger Advocate and Jamie remembers vouching for your judgment. You carry a sealed evidence folio and owe Rowan a truthful relief account. Wolf-Winter remains fully winnable through its default routes, but this profile does not receive the Road-Warden's current Fieldcraft DEF import.

profiles.title: Ironhands Repairer
profiles.summary: You have kept pumps, heaters, gates, and improvised ward-housings alive after staffed crews clocked out.
profiles.preview: Contact: Reese Pryce. Skill edge: Repair 4. Value: Ingenuity 4. Kit: insulated repair roll. Funds: 10. Standing: Ironhands Local +5. Knowledge: field infrastructure and Relief Compact. Obligation: return Reese's borrowed diagnostic tools intact.
profiles.consequence: Rowan registers you as an Ironhands Repairer and Reese remembers staking borrowed tools on your field judgment. You carry an insulated repair roll and owe Reese its safe return. Wolf-Winter remains fully winnable through its default routes, but this profile does not receive the Road-Warden's current Fieldcraft DEF import.

profiles.title: Unaffiliated Courier
profiles.summary: You refuse a faction oath, but accept one emergency tag on your own name and the consequences of carrying it alone.
profiles.preview: Contact: Emery Sloane. Skill edge: Streetwise 4. Value: Independence 4. Kit: unmarked courier satchel. Funds: 18. Standing: Independent Carriers +2. Knowledge: Relief Compact and service corridors. Obligation: return or publicly void the emergency tag; no unchanged refusal retry.
profiles.consequence: You decline institutional sponsorship. Rowan records the refusal instead of reopening the same question, then issues one limited emergency tag on your personal bond. Emery remembers witnessing the arrangement. You carry an unmarked courier satchel and must return or publicly void the tag. Wolf-Winter remains fully winnable through its default routes, but this profile does not receive the Road-Warden's current Fieldcraft DEF import.

opening_relief_oath.title: Set the Wolf-Winter Relief Terms
opening_relief_oath.message: Your registration says who you are; this line binds only the Wolf-Winter dispatch and does not replace your background or sponsor. Rowan offers three exact terms. Full Compact duty carries a provisional warrant and public-stock obligation. Aid-only duty keeps property authority with Cade. A personal bond declines deputization but still promises an exact return account. Rowan will close the selected promise as kept, released with a recorded bend, or broken; the choice cannot be rewritten after source certification.

options.title: Take Full Compact Duty
options.summary: Accept Rowan's provisional Wolf-Winter warrant and answer for Albany's public relief authority.
options.preview: The sealed boundary annex lowers the first Albany-authority fortification seat by 2 DC without changing Cade's refusal or the one-shot recovery. A kept authority return creates one fast Civic resupply claim. The ten-minute oath makes Cade's household-shutter substitution a disclosed breach.
options.consequence: Rowan countersigns full duty. Public duty becomes a named value, the Relief Compact records official standing, and the exact promise travels with the character until Wolf-Winter closes it.
options.access: A provisional warrant, boundary annex, and one Civic return-cache claim. Jamie's identical Relief Protocol claim consolidates into that cache.
options.duty: If you fortify, use Albany's assigned public seals; otherwise act life-first. Return the exact count of people, wolves, cattle, property, and public stock. Substituting Cade's household fortification breaks this term.

options.title: Negotiate Aid-Only Duty
options.summary: Accept a bounded public duty to protect and testify without taking authority over Cade's property.
options.preview: Jamie's witnessed count slip suppresses only the final ordinary cattle-alarm step on a wholly bloodless lure; it never repairs a failed cast or helps another strategy. A kept living-pack, whole-herd return creates one fast Market-rest claim. Invoking Albany authority releases the promise with a public bend on record.
options.consequence: Rowan seals the limit into the dispatch. Bounded authority becomes a named value, the Relief Compact records limited standing, and any later overstep must survive as part of the return account.
options.access: A witnessed count slip and one Market cot after a whole-herd living-pack return. A Resident Shelter cot consolidates into that same rest.
options.duty: Protect people and cattle, leave property authority with Cade, and return the exact count. Invoking Albany authority bends the limit and releases—rather than silently erases—the promise.

options.title: Remain an Unaffiliated Helper
options.summary: Decline deputization and carry the Wolf-Winter tag on a witnessed personal bond.
options.preview: Emery's service-cut insert lowers the first drive shutter signal from DC 12 to DC 10 without helping lure, hunt, or fortification. A kept returned-rig line creates one fast Independent Carriers resupply claim. Claiming Albany authority breaks the personal bond.
options.consequence: Rowan records no public warrant. Voluntary aid becomes a named value, Independent Carriers standing rises, and the personal return promise remains binding without turning the helper into Albany staff.
options.access: An ash-lane insert and one Greenway cache when the rig returns. A whole-herd drive consolidates this with Emery's existing cache; cattle-scattered return keeps the oath-named claim.
options.duty: Claim no Albany authority; return or publicly void the emergency tag with the exact count. Invoking Albany authority breaks this personal bond.

opening_lead_source.title: Certify the Wolf-Winter Source Packet
opening_lead_source.message: Rowan can attach one account before the hill dispatch closes. The civic docket leaves immediately with only the public facts. Jamie Tanner's market testimony costs time and money to verify but maps a feed-hauler's crawlboard into Cade's loft. Hayden Hale's frost report costs time but identifies a failed paling line that can be exploited only while the split rail remains unbound. Albany will pack this run against the one source you certify now; the other packets cannot be added after departure.

options.title: Leave on Rowan's Civic Docket
options.summary: Take the signed public docket without delaying the hill dispatch.
options.preview: You keep the public routes already recorded in Cade's packet, including the split-rail recovery, but carry no private market or frost evidence.
options.consequence: Rowan certifies the unaugmented civic docket. It leaves at once without a fee; the relief party will have to work from public routes and whatever it learns at the steading.

options.title: Verify Jamie's Market Testimony
options.summary: Cross-check missing cattle feed against Jamie Tanner's named delivery witnesses.
options.preview: The certified testimony identifies the feed-hauler's crawlboard into Cade's fodder loft. After the yearling is dealt with, that knowledge opens the loft approach to the flank-wolf without requiring a bound split rail; taking the drop commits you away from the ground approaches.
options.consequence: Rowan seals Jamie's witness list into the relief packet. Jamie remembers that you put the market account on the public record; after the yearling falls, the certified crawlboard becomes a committed loft approach at Cade's steading.

sponsor.note: Jamie's Ledger Advocate sponsorship pre-clears the witness counter, waiving $6 and reducing review time from 35 minutes to 15.

options.title: Take Hayden's Frost-Heave Report
options.summary: Review Hayden Hale's boundary sketch and overnight frost-heave readings.
options.preview: If the paling rail splits in Wolf-Winter and you leave it unbound, the report unlocks a fast, exposed frost-jamb line against the flank-wolf. Binding the familiar splinter guard commits away from that line.
options.consequence: Rowan stamps Hayden's route report as the controlling field account. Hayden remembers that his boundary reading carried the dispatch; at Cade's byre, an unbound failed rail can become the exposed frost-jamb maneuver.

sponsor.note: Hayden's Road-Warden sponsorship reduces the route-desk review from 20 minutes to 5.

opening_preparation.title: Allocate One Wolf-Winter Preparation
opening_preparation.message: At Hayden's departure board, choose the one sealed specialist packet that rides with the relief dispatch. Reese Pryce can mark a cold-set repair sequence onto the failing paling, Emery Sloane can map a drover's cut that peels a fouled yearling away from the herd, or Jamie Tanner can seal a relief protocol for calming the cattle after an improvised recovery. Each plan remains usable by any registered traveler, but the provider who sponsored your registration can waive the public charge and shorten the handoff. Choose one: Albany cannot put three incompatible field plans into the same urgent packet.

profiles.title: Reese's Works Fortification
profiles.summary: Carry Reese Pryce's measured wedge, splice, and cold-set sequence for Cade's failing paling.
profiles.preview: At the first loose paling rail, this replaces the ordinary wedge with one Repair check (DC 12). Success braces the breach immediately. Failure still splits the frozen rail, but the marked splice can then cold-set it without another roll; the breach is restored while the extra hammering raises cattle alarm by 1. Repair training improves the check, but every background retains the deterministic recovery.
profiles.consequence: Reese inks three measured cuts and a cold-set order onto Cade's boundary sketch. Only this fortification sequence enters the packet; Reese records who accepted the works allocation and reserves one Albany Works resupply claim if the byre is truthfully returned held.

sponsor.note: Reese's Ironhands sponsorship waives the $4 works charge and reduces the measured handoff from 25 minutes to 10.

profiles.title: Emery's Drover Route
profiles.summary: Carry Emery Sloane's one-use drover cut for recovering a fouled first feed cast.
profiles.preview: Only after the first lure cast fails, the route opens one Streetwise check (DC 12). Success turns the yearling down a service cut and lowers cattle alarm by 1. Failure sends it across the herd's sightline and raises alarm by 1; the route retires, but the existing split-rail bind or fight remains available. Streetwise training improves the attempt without class-locking it.
profiles.consequence: Emery fixes one snowed service cut between Cade's breach and the high-wood scent line. Only this drover route enters the packet; Emery records who accepted it and arranges one Albany Campus recovery cot if the byre is truthfully returned held.

sponsor.note: Emery's witness to the independent bond waives the $4 route charge and reduces the field-map handoff from 20 minutes to 5.

profiles.title: Jamie's Relief Protocol
profiles.summary: Carry Jamie Tanner's witnessed cadence for settling the herd after a rough rail recovery.
profiles.preview: After an ordinary split-rail recovery redirects the yearling alive, this opens one Mediation check (DC 12) before the loft cast. Success coordinates Cade's count and lowers cattle alarm by 1. Failure contradicts the yard calls and raises alarm by 1; the protocol retires without blocking the lure route. Mediation training improves the single attempt.
profiles.consequence: Jamie seals a named-call relief order beside Cade's herd tally. Only this protocol enters the packet; Jamie records who accepted it and reserves one Civic relief-counter resupply claim if the byre is truthfully returned held.

sponsor.note: Jamie's Ledger Advocate sponsorship waives the $4 witness fee and reduces the protocol review from 30 minutes to 10.

opening_relief_allocation.title: Place Albany's Last Relief Capacity
opening_relief_allocation.message: Hayden's departure board has one unassigned winter-relief wagon and crew. It can carry steadying fodder ahead to Cade's frightened herd, keep Albany's Market warm room staffed for vulnerable residents, or wait mobile at the hill turn for a failed field line. The board will fund exactly one. Choose what Albany protects and read what the other two needs must face without it.

options.title: Send the Wagon to Cade's Herd
options.summary: Send dry fodder and two drovers ahead to settle Cade's cattle before the relief rider arrives.
options.preview: A successful first lure cast from the exposed ridge will not add its ordinary cattle-alarm step; a fouled cast and the sheltered route keep their full consequences and every existing recovery. The wagon is spent north, so Albany holds neither the Market recovery cot nor the mobile reserve cache for your return.
options.consequence: Emery seals the fodder tally to Cade's byre tag. The herd is protected against one clean exposed-ridge cast; Albany's residents and the mobile failure line remain exposed.
options.protects: Cade's frightened herd during a clean exposed-ridge first lure cast.
options.leaves_exposed: Albany's Market warm room and the mobile hill-turn failure crew.

options.title: Keep Albany's Warm Room Staffed
options.summary: Keep the wagon crew at the Market warm room for residents who cannot safely wait out the freeze alone.
options.preview: Wolf-Winter receives no extra field action. After a truthful return with Cade's byre held, the staffed warm room offers one 15-minute fatigue-restoring recovery; it does not heal wounds or replace supplies. Cade gets no pre-feed and no mobile crew waits at the hill turn.
options.consequence: Jamie posts the residents' names above the wagon key. Albany's vulnerable households keep their staffed shelter; Cade's herd and any failed field line remain exposed.
options.protects: Albany's vulnerable residents and one fast recovery on a truthful byre-held return.
options.leaves_exposed: Cade's opening cattle pressure and the hill-turn failure line.

options.title: Hold a Mobile Failure Crew
options.summary: Hold the last wagon and crew at the hill turn until the relief rider's first field line is known.
options.preview: After a failed first fortification seat has been recovered without a reroll, the crew can stabilize that joined seam once and lower winter pressure by 1 without erasing the failure or changing the selected stance. A truthful byre-held return also releases one 15-minute Campus resupply; no pre-feed or Market recovery cot is held.
options.consequence: Hayden pins the wagon at the hill turn under your dispatch number. One failed fortification can receive measured stabilization and the returning reserve can restock the next road; Cade's pre-feed and Albany's warm-room crew remain exposed.
options.protects: One recovered fortification seam and a returned mobile road cache.
options.leaves_exposed: Cade's opening cattle pressure and Albany's Market warm room.

opening_ally.title: Choose the Wolf-Winter Field Team
opening_ally.message: June Pike has one Road-Warden field seat beside Hayden's outgoing packet. She can ride with you, but only under a named division of authority; leaving without that agreement sends the relief rider alone and does not delay the dispatch.
opening_ally.capability: On a bloodless living-pack line, June can leave the wolf line at the final threshold and take the cattle line once: she lowers cattle alarm after a recovered lure, opens the lower swing gate during a committed drive, or takes the lower cattle brace before a fortification dawn watch.
opening_ally.condition: June keeps cattle-first authority. She will not become an extra hunter, and the first wolf killed ends her place on the field team.

options.title: Grant June Cattle-First Authority
options.summary: Ask June Pike to ride as an independent Road-Warden ally.
options.preview: The briefing takes 15 minutes. June joins the field team and records your promise that she chooses the cattle line if a recovered lure leaves the herd pressing, a committed drive reaches the final threshold, or a sealed fortification reaches its dawn watch. Her help is one pressure intervention, never a combat bonus; any wolf death ends the agreement.
options.consequence: June signs beside your name, takes the second field seat, and remembers that you granted rather than merely borrowed her authority.

options.title: Negotiate for a Subordinate Relay
options.summary: Ask June to relay your orders without retaining cattle-first authority.
options.preview: The exchange takes 5 minutes. June refuses the reduced role: no unchanged retry, no companion, no field promise, and no Wolf-Winter pressure action. She remains at the Station desk while the solo route stays fully viable.
options.consequence: June records that you asked for a relay rather than an ally and declined the condition under which she would ride.

options.title: Leave with a Solo Field Team
options.summary: Keep the existing one-rider Wolf-Winter dispatch.
options.preview: No time is added. June remains with Albany's Road-Warden reserve; Wolf-Winter keeps every established route and receives no companion flag or ally action.
options.consequence: June records the clean refusal and does not reopen the same field seat after departure.

campaign_service_rules.title: Close the Full-Duty Civic Audit
campaign_service_rules.summary: Your kept full-duty promise, lawful use of Albany's public seals, and exact return count close Rowan's audit. The Civic counter releases one bounded road cache without changing Cade's refusal or refunding the spent seals.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take the Civic Standing Recovery Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: Your truthful Wolf-Winter return and 13-point Capital / Mohawk standing let Rowan close one Civic recovery docket. The staffed cot clears fatigue once; it grants no supplies, wound treatment, or authority over any Works line.

campaign_service_rules.title: Close the Aid-Only Named Count
campaign_service_rules.summary: Your kept aid-only promise returns a living pack and Cade's whole herd under Jamie's witnessed count. The Market opens one warmed recovery cot; it restores fatigue only and grants no property authority.

campaign_service_rules.title: Close the Independent Returned-Rig Bond
campaign_service_rules.summary: Your kept personal bond returns Cade's signal housing, bell, and rope after a living drive. Emery closes the unaffiliated tag and releases one Independent Carriers road cache without treating you as Albany staff.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take Reese's Closed-Rebuild Recovery Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you committed Albany's immediate hill crew to Cade's broken outer paling, Reese closes the packet at the Works counter and releases one recovery cot. It restores fatigue only and does not complete another deferred loss.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take Reese's Re-staked-Line Recovery Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you committed Albany's immediate hill crew to re-stake Cade's abandoned outer line, Reese closes the materials count and releases one recovery cot. It restores fatigue only and does not complete another deferred loss.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim Emery's Lower-Pasture Search Stores
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you committed Albany's immediate hill crew to the missing-cattle search, Emery releases one bounded Greenway cache of road food, lamp oil, search line, and tally chalk. It does not repair Cade's deferred infrastructure loss.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim the Personal-Bond Pasture Stores Line
campaign_service_rules.summary: Your kept personal bond and Emery's committed lower-pasture search open one Greenway stores line after a diverted pack left cattle missing. This 15-minute cache honors both proofs without duplicating a returned-rig cache.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take the Staffed Market Warm Room
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because Albany kept its last relief crew with vulnerable residents and your truthful return says Cade's byre held, Jamie opens the staffed warm room for one fast fatigue recovery. The cot neither treats a wound nor replaces road stores.

campaign_service_rules.title: Reclaim the Mobile Reserve Cache
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because Albany held the last relief wagon mobile and your truthful return says Cade's byre held, Blair remarshals the wagon's returned food, lamp oil, rawhide, and repair stock under Hayden's dispatch number into one road cache.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take Blair's Dispatch-Room Recovery Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you issued a confidence-labelled road warning instead of presenting an archive as settled fact, Blair clears one short dispatch-room recovery cot. It restores fatigue only; it neither changes the warning nor supplies a field record.

campaign_service_rules.title: Consolidate the Warning and Drover Recovery Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: The drover packet and Blair's calibrated warning share one Campus clinic counter. The warning proof alone releases this 15-minute recovery cot after any truthful Wolf-Winter return; if the held-byre drover claim also exists, both claims consolidate instead of duplicating recovery.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim Blair's Traceable Field Cache
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you preserved route marks, uncertainty notes, and the field provenance chain, Blair releases one Survey College cache of road food, lamp oil, tally paper, and archive sleeves. It refills supplies only; it does not certify the warning as a legal finding.

campaign_service_rules.title: Consolidate the Archive and Mobile Field Cache
campaign_service_rules.summary: The mobile-allocation docket and Blair's traceable archive share one Campus stores counter. The archive proof alone releases this 15-minute cache after any truthful Wolf-Winter return; if the held-byre mobile-reserve claim also exists, both claims consolidate instead of duplicating supplies.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim Reese's Returned-Works Stores
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because Reese allocated the fortification sequence and your truthful return says Cade's byre held, Albany Works releases one reserved cache of road food, lamp oil, rawhide, and repair stock.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take the Drover Recovery Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because Emery allocated the drover route and your truthful return says Cade's byre held, the Campus stockyard clinic opens one reserved warmed cot and recovery watch.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim the Closed-Protocol Relief Cache
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because Jamie allocated the relief protocol and your truthful return says Cade's byre held, Rowan releases one sealed Civic cache of road food, lamp oil, tally paper, and relief stores.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim Emery's Nonlethal Response Cache
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you returned a living corridor pack to the high wood while keeping Cade's herd whole, Emery Sloane releases a one-time Greenway cache of food, lamp oil, and wildlife flares for your next road.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take the Returned-Drive Recovery Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because Albany's reusable signal housing and cattle rope returned from the bloodless steading evacuation, June Pike opens one reserved Station recovery cot and accounting watch. The 15-minute rest restores fatigue only; it neither creates nor treats a lasting wound.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim Emery's Driven-Pack Response Cache
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because the bloodless drive put all three wolves beyond the abandoned outer line while Cade's whole herd escaped, Emery Sloane releases one reserved Greenway cache of food, lamp oil, and wildlife flares for the next road.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim the Preserved-Seal Road Stores
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you honored Cade's household boundary, left his outer property exposed, and returned Albany's public relief seals unused, Hayden releases one preserved Station cache of road food, lamp oil, rawhide, and repair stock.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take the Authority-Watch Recovery Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you invoked Albany authority, spent the public relief seals to keep Cade's outer property inside the line, and completed the watch without his refused help, Hayden releases one Station recovery cot and accounting watch.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim June's Returned Field Stores
campaign_service_rules.summary: June's matching living-pack testimony and kept cattle-first promise return the unused second-seat stores to one bounded Station Quarter road claim.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take June's Reserve-Desk Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: June did not ride under subordinate terms, so Albany's reserve desk stayed staffed; after the living-pack return she releases its one warmed relief cot without pretending she joined the field team.

campaign_service_rules.title: Reclaim the Unused Repair-Wagon Stores
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because Cade already has sound timber for the broken paling, Hayden returns the repair wagon's food, lamp oil, and road gear to the Station Quarter relief tag.

campaign_service_rules.title: Take the Released Night-Watch Cot
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because the inner cattle gate held behind the committed guard wood, Hayden closes the overnight watch request and releases a warmed Road Warden cot at the Station Quarter.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim Jamie's Solo-Packet Road Stores
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you sent the dawn wagon back to Cade and carried Hedrick's packet north alone, Jamie Tanner holds a one-time Market road-store credit.

campaign_service_rules.title: Claim Emery's Greenway Watch Shelter
campaign_service_rules.summary: Because you assigned the dawn wagon and wardens north, Emery Sloane holds a one-time Greenway watch-shelter claim for your part in their dispatch.

sources.label: U.S. Census Bureau Vintage 2025 subcounty population estimates
U.S. Census Bureau 2020 county subdivision gazetteer coordinates
U.S. Census Bureau 2020 place gazetteer coordinates
FHWA National Highway Freight Network Map and Tables for New York, 2022
Graph-theory guidance: zone graphs for varying-scale territories
Open-world guidance: exploration, challenge, reward, and POI readability

scale.distance_model: great-circle miles multiplied by road-class detour factors

design_rules: The player starts at one town and sees only the current location, adjacent travel edges, local points of interest, and local opportunities.
Every town/city node is a real New York population center at or above 10,000 residents in the source population data.
Edges are weighted travel routes; distance and travel time are never decorative labels.
Major corridors use the current interstate/thruway/highway structure, while regional connectors attach nearby population centers to the road mesh.
Old content packs are local discoveries placed on towns; they are not globally selectable from turn one.

Town notice boards start empty for play sessions; scouting points of interest, talking to contacts, investigating events, or exploring sites reveals one local quest lead or nearby exploration lead at a time.
Every local area has at least one point of interest, named local character, and local event, so district exploration produces place-specific texture before any quest starts.
Area interactions are verbs, not decoration: scouting a point of interest, talking to a contact, and investigating an event consume time and write journal leads from the current local area.

Longer road travel consumes supplies and adds fatigue; fatigue and missing supplies add deterministic travel delay on top of the distance-based road time, while town services such as inns, markets, healers, and stables let the traveler recover without bypassing distance.
Local events resolve only after area prep: scout a point of interest in that area, talk to that area's contact, and investigate the event on site, then spend time to earn regional renown.

Every road has a road event tied to its weighted edge; generic road reports are ambient travel texture, while explicitly authored scenes can become one-shot choices without changing distance or road class.
Each region has a regional arc anchored on its largest towns; resolving enough local events across those towns completes the thread and turns scattered town work into regional progression.

Regional exploration sites are area-anchored, not a global checklist: scouting the current area reveals nearby wild, civic, industrial, ruin, or waterway sites, and exploring them consumes time before adding journal knowledge and renown.
Known-route planning reports distance-based road time separately from condition-based delay, supply use, and fatigue gain so travel preparation is visible before committing.
Every town has first-class local areas, and the number of areas scales by population tier so bigger cities expose more internal exploration before their leads are exhausted.
Every local area has at least one discoverable local job, so even towns without a full authored quest source still provide timed work, renown, and local texture through exploration.

Only explicitly authored road events are actionable travel beats: an unconditional scene or one activated by the current campaign goal can stop a leg once for scene-specific scouting, assistance, or pressing on; goal-linked scenes retire after their quest resolves, and ambient reports never block the next road.
Every town has a connected, looped local-area route graph; larger cities gain shortcuts and cross-district links so city exploration is not a single linear corridor.
Pack-backed quest leads are anchored to specific local areas; discovering a notice is not enough to start it until the traveler reaches the area where the lead is posted.
Stateful play exposes only the current local area's POIs, contacts, events, and discovered jobs; moving through local-area routes changes the available actions.
Every local area has a regional exploration site, giving each district at least one larger expedition hook beyond jobs, contacts, and events.

regions.name: Capital / Mohawk
regions.summary: Government corridors, canal towns, colleges, river crossings, and old industrial districts where public contracts and private salvage constantly overlap.
regions.gameplay_role: Administrative hub with dense notice work, route information, and faction introductions for the rest of the state.

regions.name: Central New York
regions.summary: Thruway crossroads, lake-effect weather, farm markets, small factories, and university towns tied together by I-81 and I-90.
regions.gameplay_role: Crossroads region built for branching travel choices, weather events, and supply-chain quests.

regions.name: Finger Lakes / Genesee
regions.summary: Lake towns, Genesee river cities, vineyards, old mills, medical campuses, and canal-era settlements with deep local rivalries.
regions.gameplay_role: Exploration region with water-adjacent POIs, academic leads, and settlement-to-settlement investigation loops.

regions.name: Hudson Valley / Metro North
regions.summary: River cities, commuter rail towns, wooded ridges, estates, reservoirs, and parkways running between dense suburbs and quiet back roads.
regions.gameplay_role: Vertical contrast region: fast roads, hidden side sites, and local conflicts between commuters, courts, and upland settlements.

regions.name: Long Island
regions.summary: Dense villages, coastal towns, parkways, harbors, barrier beaches, laboratories, and crowded east-west arteries.
regions.gameplay_role: High-density exploration belt where travel is short but routes are congested and every town has overlapping witnesses.

regions.name: New York City
regions.summary: The state-scale metropolis: ports, rail terminals, courts, markets, tunnels, universities, hospitals, and borough-scale neighborhoods stacked together.
regions.gameplay_role: Mega-hub with layered factions, high service density, and many local quest origins without becoming a global quest menu.

regions.name: North Country
regions.summary: Adirondack gateways, border crossings, lake ports, long winter roads, military towns, and isolated service centers.
regions.gameplay_role: Long-distance frontier region where road choice, supplies, and route encounters matter more than dense town chains.

regions.name: Southern Tier
regions.summary: I-86 towns, river valleys, college cities, old glass and rail districts, floodplains, and Pennsylvania-border routes.
regions.gameplay_role: Linear valley region with longer legs, industrial mysteries, and terrain-driven hazards.

regions.name: Western New York
regions.summary: Great Lakes ports, Niagara crossings, manufacturing suburbs, canal towns, snow belts, and border trade routes.
regions.gameplay_role: Border-and-industry region with heavy-road travel, winter pressure, and faction work around crossings and freight.

regional_arcs.title: Capitol Corridor Stabilization
regional_arcs.summary: Capitol Corridor Stabilization ties together the largest Capital / Mohawk settlements. Resolve local events across anchor towns to stabilize travel, rumor, and service routes for the whole region.
regional_arcs.reward: Completing this thread marks Capital / Mohawk as regionally stabilized and makes its local contacts treat the traveler as a proven problem-solver.

regional_arcs.title: Central Crossroads Watch

areas.name: New York Civic Center
areas.summary: Municipal steps, notice boards, and official counters make this the practical center of New York. It is where a metropolis's rumors become jobs, warrants, and favors.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal official notices, regional arc leads, and who has authority in New York City.

areas.name: New York Market Streets
areas.summary: Shopfronts, diners, small depots, and late counters keep New York's trade moving. Travelers can hear what locals need before it becomes posted work.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal local quest leads, resupply opportunities, and rumors that have not reached the board yet.

areas.name: New York Station Quarter
areas.summary: Road crews, bus stops, rail sidings, parking lots, and stable yards collect people moving through New York. Routes out of town are easiest to read here.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal road conditions, new route hooks, and travelers with news from adjacent towns.

areas.name: New York Works District
areas.summary: Loading doors, repair bays, warehouses, and service roads mark the working edge of New York. Problems here tend to become hazards before they become headlines.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal hazards, labor conflicts, and material clues tied to local events.

areas.name: New York Greenway
areas.summary: Parks, creek paths, trailheads, and utility cuts soften the built edge of New York. It is a good place to find tracks, camps, and quiet witnesses.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal regional sites, tracks, camps, and wildland approaches.

areas.name: New York Campus Row
areas.summary: Lecture halls, clinics, archives, and student rooms give New York a place where expertise gathers. Strange requests often start as research before turning dangerous.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal experts, archives, medical aid, and strange research requests.

areas.name: New York Old Quarter
areas.summary: Older facades and preserved streets keep New York's memory visible. Cellars, plaques, churches, and closed offices make old conflicts easy to miss.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal old documents, locked rooms, and buried links between quests.

areas.name: New York Ward
areas.summary: Dense blocks, porches, apartment walks, and neighborhood shops show how New York actually lives after the offices close. Favors and disputes travel fast here.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal witnesses, family disputes, and contacts who avoid official boards.

areas.name: New York Outskirts
areas.summary: Shoulders, sheds, park-and-ride lots, and half-rural lanes mark where New York thins into county road. The next clue is often just beyond the streetlights.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal ambush sites, road events, and the first signs of trouble beyond town.

areas.name: New York Waterfront
areas.summary: Ferry slips, wet rails, shoreline paths, and flood-scarred buildings give New York a second face along the water. Smugglers, fishers, and inspectors all leave traces here.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal waterway routes, shoreline ruins, and cargo disputes.

areas.name: Albany Civic Center
areas.summary: Municipal steps and court counters face a notice wall crowded with canal claims, winter-relief petitions, and freight tags from the hill farms west of the Hudson. Three leads sit close enough to start with: the marked Notice Hall board, Rowan Quill's records desk, and a charter-backlog stair where clerks keep ducking below.
areas.discovery: Exploring the Civic Center follows those leads into the first ledger run, the Civic Underrooms, and the Market Streets route before the Station Quarter packet can make sense.

areas.name: Albany Market Streets

areas.name: Albany Station Quarter
areas.summary: Rail sidings, bus bays, road-warden desks, and stable yards hold Albany's emergency traffic: Rowan's circled petition comes here as a route tag, and Hayden's board turns it from paperwork into a hill-road dispatch.

areas.name: Queensbury Civic Center
areas.summary: Road wardens pin fresh snow reports beside the municipal notices. One black-bordered shepherd's petition points from these steps toward Hedrick Cradoc in the market streets.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal official notices, the road north, and where Queensbury's shepherds bring trouble that cannot wait for a routine posting.

areas.name: Queensbury Market Streets
areas.summary: Wool carts and winter stalls crowd the market, but Hedrick Cradoc's mud-dark tracking log has opened a hard circle of silence: his father died on the high moor that morning.
areas.discovery: Exploring it can reveal Hedrick's Gallowmere lead, resupply opportunities, and what the old grey sow left in the peat above town.

characters.agenda: Wants a traveler to handle Smithtown Campus Row's local problems before they spread through the Long Island road network.

characters.name: Rowan Quill
characters.summary: Rowan Quill has ink on both cuffs and a clerk's memory for which petitions are real trouble.
characters.agenda: Ask Rowan what matters before the office closes: they can separate ledger work, basement writs, and station-yard relief tags from ordinary counter noise.

variants.summary: Rowan closes the full Compact oath as kept: the Wolf-Winter count, public authority, and spent relief seals all match the returned record.
variants.agenda: The kept oath remains history rather than a reusable warrant. Its one Civic audit cache is available only if the exact authority return still satisfies the authored service claim.

variants.summary: Rowan closes the full Compact oath as broken: you substituted Cade's private shutters after accepting a term that required Albany's public seals for fortification.
variants.agenda: The byre may have survived, but the promised authority line did not. No kept-duty Civic cache can be claimed, and the breach remains on the character record.

variants.summary: Rowan closes the aid-only promise as kept: the exact return never claimed authority beyond the bounded public duty you negotiated.
variants.agenda: A living-pack, whole-herd return may still support Jamie's one witnessed Market recovery; the limit itself grants no continuing property authority.

variants.summary: Rowan releases the aid-only promise with a recorded bend: you invoked Albany authority after promising to leave Cade's property authority bounded.
variants.agenda: The bend is neither relabelled as fulfilment nor escalated into the personal-bond breach. The released promise cannot unlock the kept-duty Market claim.

variants.summary: Rowan closes the unaffiliated personal bond as kept: you returned the exact count without claiming Albany's warrant as your own.
variants.agenda: If the living drive also returned Cade's finite rig, Emery can release the one Independent Carriers road cache attached to this closed bond.

variants.summary: Rowan closes the personal bond as broken: the dispatch recorded no deputization, but you later invoked Albany authority over Cade's property.
variants.agenda: The successful field result does not rewrite the authority claim. The broken bond cannot unlock the Independent Carriers return cache.

variants.summary: Rowan remembers countersigning your provisional Wolf-Winter warrant and sealing the public boundary annex into the packet.
variants.agenda: Full duty improves only the first Albany-authority seal seat. Fortifying with Cade's household shutters is the disclosed breach; every other strategy remains open.

variants.summary: Rowan remembers the aid-only limit: protect and testify, but leave authority over Cade's property with Cade.
variants.agenda: Jamie's named-count slip suppresses only the last ordinary pressure step on a wholly bloodless lure. Invoking Albany authority records a bend and releases the promise.

variants.summary: Rowan remembers issuing no warrant: your Wolf-Winter tag rides on an unaffiliated personal bond witnessed for the Independent Carriers.
variants.agenda: Emery's ash-lane insert improves only the first drive signal. Claiming Albany authority breaks the bond; lure, hunt, and household fortification remain fully viable.

variants.summary: Rowan checks the Road-Warden stamp drying on your card and remembers the fieldcraft record you put under your own name.
variants.agenda: The registration is closed, not a form to repeat. Rowan directs you to Hayden Hale's Station Quarter desk, where the first winter relief packet is waiting.

variants.summary: Rowan recognizes the sealed folio and the Ledger Advocate entry they countersigned for your truthful return account.
variants.agenda: The registration is closed, not a form to repeat. Rowan directs you to Hayden Hale's Station Quarter desk and reminds you that a relief return must distinguish evidence from rumor.

variants.summary: Rowan remembers Reese Pryce's tool bond beside your Ironhands registration and checks that the repair roll is still sealed.
variants.agenda: The registration is closed, not a form to repeat. Rowan directs you to Hayden Hale's Station Quarter desk, where a failing steading boundary has become a relief matter.

variants.summary: Rowan remembers that you refused every faction oath and accepted a single emergency tag on your personal bond instead.
variants.agenda: The refusal stands and cannot be retried into a cleaner bargain. Rowan directs you to Hayden Hale's Station Quarter desk and keeps the public-voiding form ready for your eventual return.

characters.name: Jamie Tanner
characters.summary: Jamie Tanner works as the market broker in Albany Market Streets, watching how shortages, disputed deliveries, and late counters affect Albany city.
characters.agenda: Wants a traveler to handle Albany Market Streets's local problems before they spread through the Capital / Mohawk road network.

variants.summary: Jamie remembers that you kept Albany's last winter crew on the Market warm-room list instead of sending it north.
variants.agenda: The named residents keep their staffed shelter. If Cade's byre returns truthfully held, Jamie will open the same warm room for one fast fatigue recovery without calling it wound care or resupply.

variants.summary: Jamie remembers sealing Cade's named-call relief order into your packet and keeps its witness list beside the herd tally.
variants.agenda: The protocol offers one accountable attempt after a rough rail recovery, not blanket calm. Jamie expects the return to record whether the calls settled the herd or worsened its alarm.

variants.summary: Jamie sees Rowan's certification number beside the missing-feed witnesses and remembers that you made the market account answerable in public.
variants.agenda: The testimony bought a real feed-hauler route into Cade's loft, not a guaranteed outcome. Jamie keeps the named witnesses and certification number fixed in the public record.

variants.summary: Jamie remembers vouching for your Ledger Advocate judgment and keeps a clear witness counter beside the ordinary market books.
variants.agenda: Jamie will compare any disputed relief account against named witnesses; the sponsorship buys scrutiny, not automatic agreement.

characters.name: Hayden Hale
characters.summary: Hayden Hale dispatches road wardens from Albany Station Quarter, matching late coaches, snow reports, and relief freight to travelers who can move faster than official crews.
characters.agenda: Hayden matches every hill dispatch to Rowan's controlling source certification; settled packets carry route timing to Old Cade's steading and the other winter stops.

variants.summary: Hayden remembers pinning Albany's last relief wagon at the hill turn under your dispatch number instead of assigning it to Cade or the Market warm room.
variants.agenda: The crew may stabilize one honestly failed and already recovered fortification seam. A byre-held return remarshal its road stores at Campus; it never invents a retry or refunds stance-owned costs.

variants.summary: Hayden has the bloodless fortification return: Cade's household and whole herd reached dawn behind his shutters, Albany's public relief seals came home unused, and the outer property remained exposed.
variants.agenda: Hayden releases one preserved-seal Station road cache while keeping the exposed outer property on Cade's live relief line. Honoring Cade's terms does not let the return board pretend every building was protected.

variants.summary: Hayden has the authority-watch return: Cade's household, whole herd, and outer property reached dawn inside the sealed line, but Albany's public relief seals were spent and Cade refused to help under the order.
variants.agenda: Hayden releases one Station recovery cot for the unsupported watch while keeping the spent public stock and Cade's refusal on separate, truthful ledger lines.

variants.summary: Hayden remembers putting his own name behind your Road-Warden registration and has Cade's surviving cattle and broken paling entered beneath that sponsorship on the return board.
variants.agenda: The winter packet is closed, but Hayden expects the honest field account you promised and treats its facts as a live test of his future dispatches.

variants.summary: Hayden Hale has crossed both Cade's hill-steading relief packet and Hedrick Cradoc's moor report off the Station Quarter board; the wardens have filed the returns and moved those crews on.
variants.agenda: He has no old winter dispatch left to press on you. He points instead to the current journey goal already visible on your docket.

variants.summary: Hayden Hale has Cade's surviving cattle and the broken paling entered on the Station Quarter return board.
variants.agenda: The Cade packet is closed. The other live report in that chain is already reflected in the current journey goal on your docket.

variants.summary: Hayden recognizes his frost-heave sketch under Rowan's certification stamp and remembers that you made his boundary reading the controlling field account.
variants.agenda: The report exposes one dangerous line only if the paling fails and remains unbound. Hayden keeps that condition exact rather than treating the report as a general field advantage.

variants.summary: Hayden recognizes the Road-Warden field kit and remembers staking his dispatch reputation on your winter registration.
variants.agenda: He has a specific hill-steading packet ready. Your fieldcraft record may steady the dangerous work, but the signed return account remains your debt.

characters.name: June Pike
characters.summary: June Pike checks a cattle rope, hooded lantern, and one empty field seat beside Hayden Hale's Wolf-Winter packet.
characters.agenda: June will ride only with cattle-first authority of her own. She offers one cattle-line intervention on a bloodless lure, drive, or fortification line, not another spear or another laborer, and remains in Albany if that condition is refused.

variants.summary: June has returned with her lower-cattle-brace account matched to yours: she honored Cade's household boundary, the whole herd reached dawn, and Albany's public seals returned unused while the outer property stayed exposed.
variants.agenda: The cattle-first promise is kept. June records that her independent brace protected the herd without turning her into Cade's fortification labor or hiding the property left outside his terms.

variants.summary: June's matching return recognizes lawful Albany authority over the sealed line: her lower cattle brace held the whole herd while the public relief seals were spent and Cade refused the recovery hand.
variants.agenda: The cattle-first promise is kept. June distinguishes her independent herd authority from the order Cade refused and will not erase either the preserved outer property or Albany's spent stock.

variants.summary: June has returned beside the whole herd with her lower-gate account matched to your bound shoulder: the living pack cleared the abandoned line, and the courier returned with an untreated wound.
variants.agenda: The cattle-first promise is kept. The returned drive rig opens one Station recovery cot, but June will not let its rest erase the untreated wound from the ledger.

variants.summary: June has returned with every person safe and two cattle still missing. Her lower swing-gate held, but the person-first front line overran the herd beyond it.
variants.agenda: The cattle-first promise is kept without disguising the loss. The returned drive rig opens one Station recovery cot while the lower-pasture search stays live.

variants.summary: June has returned with every person and the whole herd, while her matching account records the signal-and-rope rig cut apart at the front line.
variants.agenda: The cattle-first promise is kept, but no returned-drive cot is claimed from equipment that did not come home; Albany carries the resource loss forward.

variants.summary: June has returned beside you with an unbloodied rope and a matching account: she held the lower cattle line while the living pack cleared the byre.
variants.agenda: The cattle-first promise is kept. She remains on the field roster and opens one Station-quarter resupply claim before the next road.

variants.summary: June has returned beside you with the living-pack result and the two missing cattle entered on the same truthful line.
variants.agenda: The cattle-first authority remained intact despite the loss. She stays on the roster and will release one bounded Station resupply claim.

variants.summary: June's field seat is empty. Her separate return records the first wolf death before she could take the lower rail; that death ended the cattle-first field agreement.
variants.agenda: The promise is recorded broken, June has left the party, and no ally return claim is available; the completed Wolf-Winter result still stands.

variants.summary: June has signed the Wolf-Winter field line beside your name and remembers that cattle-first authority was granted explicitly.
variants.agenda: She will take the cattle line once after a failed lure is recovered alive, when a committed drive reaches its final threshold, or before a sealed fortification's dawn watch, but the first wolf killed ends her place on the team.

variants.summary: June remembers refusing the request to serve as a subordinate relay without authority over the cattle line.
variants.agenda: The refusal stands without an unchanged retry. She remains with Albany's reserve while the solo Wolf-Winter dispatch stays open.

variants.summary: June has your clean solo refusal marked beside the still-empty second field seat.
variants.agenda: She will not reopen the same departure bargain; Albany keeps its Road-Warden reserve and you carry the established packet alone.

characters.name: Reese Pryce
characters.summary: Reese Pryce works as the works foreman in Albany Works District, watching how locked yards, bad machinery, and crews staying past dusk affect Albany city.
characters.agenda: Wants a traveler to handle Albany Works District's local problems before they spread through the Capital / Mohawk road network.

variants.summary: Reese remembers measuring the Wolf-Winter wedge and cold-set splice into your relief packet, with each cut serialed against the Albany Works ledger.
variants.agenda: The fortification gets one Repair attempt and one noisy deterministic recovery. Reese wants the return to distinguish a clean brace from a split rail cold-set under pressure.

variants.summary: Reese remembers serialing the insulated repair roll to your registration and checks its seals before discussing any new yard work.
variants.agenda: The borrowed tools make you accountable for what returns, what breaks, and what evidence of field failure you bring back.

characters.name: Emery Sloane
characters.summary: Emery Sloane works as the park warden in Albany Greenway, watching how tracks, utility cuts, and witnesses who avoid main streets affect Albany city.
characters.agenda: Wants a traveler to handle Albany Greenway's local problems before they spread through the Capital / Mohawk road network.

variants.summary: Emery remembers sending Albany's last wagon north with dry fodder and two drovers for Cade's frightened herd.
variants.agenda: The pre-feed can absorb one clean exposed-ridge cast's cattle pressure. A fouled cast keeps its full failure, and the spent wagon leaves no Market cot or mobile cache to reclaim.

variants.summary: Emery has the bloodless drive tally: all three wolves beyond the abandoned outer line, Cade's whole herd clear, and the courier back with an untreated gate wound.
variants.agenda: Emery releases one driven-pack response cache for the whole-herd result, but keeps the wound and the pack's displaced range on separate live lines.

variants.summary: Emery has the person-first drive tally: every person safe and all three wolves alive beyond the abandoned line, with two cattle still missing down the lower pasture.
variants.agenda: Emery will not issue a whole-herd cache for a scattered herd; the missing cattle and the driven pack's new range remain the truthful next work.

variants.summary: Emery has the reserve-spent drive tally: every person and the whole herd clear, all three wolves alive, and Albany's signal-and-rope rig left cut apart at the byre mouth.
variants.agenda: Emery releases one driven-pack response cache while keeping the destroyed rig as a real relief loss, not an invisible cost of the clean herd count.

variants.summary: Emery remembers fixing the snowed drover cut into your Wolf-Winter packet and marking the single turn where it can peel a fouled yearling away.
variants.agenda: The route is one recovery attempt, not another feed cast. Emery expects the return to count both the living wolf's direction and any alarm raised across the herd's sightline.

variants.summary: Emery has Cade's exact mixed-line tally: the yearling died at the breach, two wolves returned alive to the high wood, and two cattle remain missing down the lower pasture.
variants.agenda: Emery will not call the result clean or useless; recovering the missing cattle and watching the two surviving wolves now outrank either reward or reprisal.

variants.summary: Emery has Cade's whole-herd tally beside the unbloodied relief report and remembers that you returned the living pack to the high-wood corridor.
variants.agenda: Emery will release one Greenway nonlethal-response cache, then wants the pack's new range watched without turning the successful diversion into an excuse for another hunt.

variants.summary: Emery remembers that you spared the pack but returned with Cade's honest count of two cattle scattered after the herd broke.
variants.agenda: Emery accepts the nonlethal result without calling it clean; finding the missing cattle and tracking the displaced pack now outrank any reward.

variants.summary: Emery remembers witnessing your refusal of a faction oath and the limited emergency tag Rowan issued on your personal bond.
variants.agenda: Emery will witness an honest return or public voiding of the tag, but will not let independence erase the consequences carried under it.

characters.name: Blair Drake
characters.summary: Blair Drake cross-indexes winter road marks, clinic testimony, and field reports at Albany Campus Row, where a confident warning can save hours and a false certainty can misroute the next relief crew.
characters.agenda: After Wolf-Winter, Blair wants one honest operational record: either a fast warning labelled by confidence or a slower audit-ready archive preserving provenance, uncertainty, and route marks. Blair refuses to present either as a Civic legal finding or let one traveler claim both rewards.

local_events.title: Albany Civic Center: charter backlog
local_events.summary: Charter runners stack sealed files by the public stair while a deputy keeps sending people to the wrong counter. To clear the backlog, read the Notice Hall marks, ask Rowan which docket matters, then inspect the stair and underrooms.

authored_scene.prompt: Rowan can clear the blocked winter-relief petitions only if you choose how the household affidavits enter Albany's record. A public record supports stronger later scrutiny and standing but takes longer to close; a protected schedule keeps names sealed and can be closed faster. Both clear today's stair on identical terms, and Rowan will not reopen the choice after a field return.

options.title: Open a public winter-relief record
options.preview: Spend 50 minutes matching the petition marks into a public, auditable relief count. Earn 2 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Rowan publishes the relief totals and household claims under the public charter. The filing is permanent: a truthful field return can support stronger public scrutiny and standing, but takes longer to audit and puts named hardship in the open record.

options.title: Protect the household relief details
options.preview: Spend 50 minutes matching the same petition marks into a sealed household schedule. Earn 2 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Rowan records the relief totals while sealing names and household details under the charter's privacy rule. The filing is permanent: a truthful field return can close faster for less public standing, and hardship stays protected.

local_events.title: Jamie Tanner's Winter Price Policy
local_events.summary: After The Wolf-Winter, Jamie Tanner has one evening to decide how Albany's winter crates are priced: hold named household and kitchen prices, or publish an open-bid ceiling and visible buyer board. The permanent policy determines which disputed-crate settlement can later be defended.

authored_scene.prompt: Jamie has counted the returned relief stock and the late carts. Albany can protect named household and kitchen prices, whose later crate settlements take longer but earn stronger standing, or publish a ceiling and every buyer's place in line, whose settlements move faster for less standing. Jamie will not reopen the policy once the board goes up.

options.title: Hold named household and kitchen prices
options.preview: Spend 35 minutes posting the named household and kitchen rates before the late carts unload. Earn 2 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Jamie fixes the named household and kitchen prices for this relief stock. The later disputed crates can be released through the named kitchen ledger in 30 minutes for 3 standing or audited through the full household chain in 75 minutes for 5 standing.

options.title: Publish an open-bid ceiling and visible buyer board
options.preview: Spend 35 minutes posting the ceiling, bid order, and named buyers before the late carts unload. Earn 2 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Jamie posts the ceiling and a visible buyer board for this relief stock. The later disputed crates can be released from the board in 20 minutes for 1 standing or audited through the public bid chain in 60 minutes for 4 standing.

local_events.title: Albany Station Quarter: winter relief packet
local_events.summary: A northbound relief packet sits open at the route desk: Rowan's docket mark, Hayden's route pin, no team back from the hill road, Old Cade's cattle penned at a byre, and the weather report worsening. Resolving it requires scouting this area, talking to its contact, and investigating on site.

road_events.title: The northbound relief line
road_events.summary: Snow ruts and Albany relief-wagon tracks braid the road between the capital and Saratoga Springs. Wardens at each turnout repeat the same fresh warning: a shepherd was killed above Queensbury, and his son is waiting with the spoor record.

cautious_scout.label: Read the warden signs
cautious_scout.outcome: You compare wagon ruts, warden marks, and the shepherd's broad-spoor warning before choosing the clearest line onward.

assist_travelers.label: Free a relief wagon
assist_travelers.outcome: You spend time and stores levering a relief wagon out of the snow ruts, keeping both the supplies and the fresh warning moving.

press_on.label: Carry the warning onward
press_on.outcome: You leave the bogged wagons to the wardens and carry their fresh Queensbury warning down the open road at pace.

road_events.title: Thruway shoulder flare-up
road_events.summary: Between Albany city and Colonie town, I-90 squeezes past warehouse ramps where a jackknifed box truck and state-police flares narrow the shoulder; scouting, hands-on help, or a hard push all have visible costs.

cautious_scout.label: Walk the flare line
cautious_scout.outcome: You read the skid marks and oncoming traffic, then mark the clearest line past the wreck before moving through.

assist_travelers.label: Help right the box truck
assist_travelers.outcome: You spend time and stores helping the stranded crew shift the box truck far enough to reopen the shoulder.

press_on.label: Thread the narrow shoulder
press_on.outcome: You take the flare-lit gap at pace, accepting the strain before the next wave of traffic closes it.

road_events.title: The river at the mile stones
road_events.summary: Between Rome and Oneida, rain-fed water noses over the ditch stones while mill hands hammer fresh height marks into a bridge pier. Reports moving both ways agree: the upper weir is groaning and every downstream channel is rising.

cautious_scout.label: Read the flood marks
cautious_scout.outcome: You compare the fresh pier marks with the drowned ditch stones, learning how quickly the river has climbed before moving on.

assist_travelers.label: Shore the washout stakes
assist_travelers.outcome: You spend time and stores helping the mill hands brace warning stakes along the soaked verge before the next rise.

press_on.label: Race the rising water
press_on.outcome: You take the exposed stretch at pace before another wash crosses it, accepting the hard strain of the gamble.

quests.title: The Wolf-Winter
quests.discovery: A winter-relief tag moves from Albany's civic records to the Albany Station Quarter route desk: Old Cade's hill steading, a cattle byre, and a wolf pack coming down with the weather. The live dispatch has June Pike's optional second field seat, but starting without her cattle-first bond sends the relief rider alone on the established route.

launch.prompt: Hayden's dispatch names two last-mile roads to Cade's hill steading. Choose which cost and field condition you will carry into the Wolf-Winter watch.

options.title: Take the Exposed Ridge Road
options.summary: Reach Cade quickly across the open crest, accepting a harder cattle arrival for a clearer first feed cast.
options.preview: Costs 30 minutes, 1 supply, and 25 fatigue. The open crest exposes the smoke plume, wolf breath, and crosswind, lowering the first downwind feed cast to DC 10, but the visible descent raises cattle alarm by 1 before the watch. A clean three-cast lure line therefore reaches alarm 4 (Breaking) and scatters cattle.
options.consequence: You spend 30 minutes, 1 supply, and 25 fatigue on the exposed crest. The plume and crosswind are legible for the first cast, but the herd sees the descent and begins the watch at cattle alarm 1.
options.return_summary: You reached Cade by the exposed ridge: faster and better sighted for the first lure cast, with the cattle already alarmed by the visible descent.

options.title: Take the Sheltered Stockway
options.summary: Spend longer under the lee to keep the herd calm, accepting a concealed crosswind at the first feed cast.
options.preview: Costs 75 minutes, 2 supplies, and 10 fatigue. The sheltered stockway keeps the herd calm at arrival but conceals the crosswind, leaving the first downwind feed cast at DC 12. A clean three-cast lure line reaches alarm 3 (Restless), keeps the whole herd, and remains below Breaking.
options.consequence: You spend 75 minutes, 2 supplies, and 10 fatigue under the lee. The cattle do not see the approach and begin steady, while the hidden crosswind leaves the first feed cast at DC 12.
options.return_summary: You reached Cade by the sheltered stockway: slower and less tiring, with the herd calm but the first lure crosswind concealed.

local_jobs.title: Rowan's Winter Return Docket
local_jobs.summary: After The Wolf-Winter, Rowan must reconcile the permanent charter filing with what actually happened at Cade's steading. The earlier public-or-protected record and the truthful held-or-evacuated return determine the only lawful closure.
local_jobs.objective: Return to the Notice Hall and close the exact relief record you authored before departure against Albany's certified Wolf-Winter outcome.
local_jobs.reward: Earn 1 or 3 Capital / Mohawk renown according to the lawful closure, with public scrutiny costing more time than protected filing.

authored_scene.prompt: Rowan lays the pre-departure charter record beside the certified return. There is no second policy choice now: Albany can close only the filing you actually authored, against whether Cade's byre held or the steading evacuated.

options.title: File the public held-byre return
options.preview: Spend 70 minutes publishing the held-byre count against every open household claim. Earn 3 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Rowan closes the public relief record with Cade's byre held, names the claims met and still exposed, and makes the exact return available for civic scrutiny.

options.title: Seal the protected held-byre return
options.preview: Spend 25 minutes certifying the held-byre count without reopening household details. Earn 1 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Rowan closes the protected schedule with Cade's byre held, preserves the household seals, and records only the minimum certified relief count.

options.title: File the public evacuation return
options.preview: Spend 60 minutes publishing the evacuation and loss count against every open household claim. Earn 3 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Rowan closes the public relief record with the steading evacuated, names the losses and displaced claims, and makes Albany's exact shortfall available for civic scrutiny.

options.title: Seal the protected evacuation return
options.preview: Spend 20 minutes certifying the evacuation and minimum warning without reopening household details. Earn 1 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Rowan closes the protected schedule with the steading evacuated, preserves the household seals, and records the minimum warning needed for Albany's next relief action.

local_jobs.title: Jamie's Disputed Crates
local_jobs.summary: The late relief crates arrived under the exact price policy Jamie posted after The Wolf-Winter. Two claimants now want the same stock; a quick operational release keeps kitchens moving, while a slower audited chain makes the policy answerable in public.
local_jobs.objective: Settle the disputed crates through the one permanent Market policy actually posted, choosing the speed of release or the standing of an auditable chain.
local_jobs.reward: Earn 1-5 Capital / Mohawk renown according to the bound policy and settlement: household-price work takes longer but earns more standing, while open-bid work releases the crates faster.

authored_scene.prompt: Jamie puts the two claims beside the policy you already posted. There is no neutral settlement: the household-price line takes 30 or 75 minutes for 3 or 5 standing, while the open-bid line takes 20 or 60 minutes for 1 or 4 standing. Only the two settlements authorized by your policy are legal, and choosing one retires the other claim path.

options.title: Release the price-hold crates through Jamie's kitchen ledger
options.preview: Spend 30 minutes matching the named kitchen ledger to the two carts and release the crates before service. Earn 3 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Jamie releases the crates through the protected kitchen ledger. Service resumes quickly, but the household rate chain remains a narrow operational record rather than an audited public account.

options.title: Audit the price-hold household chain in public
options.preview: Spend 75 minutes auditing each named household and kitchen claim against the held-rate ledger. Earn 5 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Jamie publishes the household chain behind the held prices, resolves the disputed crates under the policy Albany actually chose, and leaves the relief account strong enough for later Civic standing review.

options.title: Release the open-bid crates from the visible buyer board
options.preview: Spend 20 minutes matching the ceiling and board order to the two carts and release the crates before service. Earn 1 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Jamie releases the crates in the posted buyer order under the public ceiling. Service resumes quickly, but the board remains an operational posting rather than an audited public chain.

options.title: Audit the open-bid public chain
options.preview: Spend 60 minutes auditing the ceiling, board order, and each buyer claim before releasing the crates. Earn 4 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: Jamie audits the visible buyer chain behind the ceiling, resolves the disputed crates under the policy Albany actually chose, and leaves the relief account strong enough for later Civic standing review.

local_jobs.title: Hayden's Cade Return Packet
local_jobs.summary: Cade's field dispatch is closed, but Hayden's return packet still carries the exact repair, abandoned-line, or missing-cattle claim certified by the Wolf-Winter return.
local_jobs.objective: Commit Albany's one immediate follow-up crew to one loss the certified Cade return actually left behind.
local_jobs.reward: Earn 2-4 Capital / Mohawk renown and create one exact downstream recovery or create/consolidate one stores line; any other simultaneous loss remains deferred.

authored_scene.prompt: Hayden can release one immediate follow-up crew before the next snow closes the hill road. Every available option below comes from the certified Cade return. If two losses remain, choosing one retires this packet and leaves the other honestly deferred.

options.title: Dispatch Reese's crew to rebuild Cade's outer paling
options.preview: Spend 45 minutes matching the broken-paling count to Reese's cold-set crew. Earn 3 Capital / Mohawk renown and reserve one 15-minute Works recovery cot.
options.consequence: Hayden gives the immediate hill slot to the paling rebuild. Any simultaneous missing-cattle search remains deferred on Cade's return ledger.

options.title: Dispatch a crew to re-stake Cade's abandoned outer line
options.preview: Spend 35 minutes turning the abandoned-line return into posts, lamps, and a marked evacuation route. Earn 2 Capital / Mohawk renown and reserve one 15-minute Works recovery cot.
options.consequence: Hayden gives the immediate hill slot to the evacuation line. Any simultaneous missing-cattle search remains deferred on Cade's return ledger.

options.title: Dispatch Emery's lower-pasture search for Cade's missing cattle
options.preview: Spend 60 minutes reconciling the missing-cattle marks with Emery's search grid. Earn 4 Capital / Mohawk renown and create or consolidate one 15-minute Greenway stores line; an already-claimed returned-rig cache satisfies that shared line.
options.consequence: Hayden gives the immediate hill slot to the lower-pasture search. Emery creates a Greenway stores line unless your personal-bond returned-rig cache already satisfied it; any simultaneous paling or evacuation-line work remains deferred.

local_jobs.title: Reese's Two Winter Lines
local_jobs.summary: After The Wolf-Winter return, Reese has a public Works shift held safely behind a jammed yard gate and an outbound municipal cold-set reserve waiting for an accountable serial count.
local_jobs.objective: Inspect the Works Gate, hear Reese's two time-sensitive lines, and decide which one receives your help first.
local_jobs.reward: Earn 2 or 5 Capital / Mohawk renown according to the Works priority you complete.

authored_scene.prompt: Reese has a public shift warm behind a jammed safety gate, while the outbound municipal cold-set reserve needs an accountable count before dispatch. You can own only one line before your shift closes; Reese routes the other to his crew.

options.title: Protect the trapped public Works shift
options.preview: Spend 80 minutes isolating the failed hoist, bracing the access lane, and bringing the waiting shift through the safety gate. Earn 5 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: The shift walks out together under Reese's count, your completed-work journal fixes the public crew as your priority, and Reese routes the reserve inventory to his yard crew.

options.title: Inventory and seal the outbound cold-set reserve for the next dispatch
options.preview: Spend 35 minutes matching every reserve wedge, seal, and splice to the outbound municipal ledger before the next dispatch. Earn 2 Capital / Mohawk renown.
options.consequence: The serial count closes and the outbound reserve is sealed in its marked bays, your completed-work journal fixes inventory as your priority, and Reese routes the trapped-shift extraction to his public crew.

local_jobs.title: Albany Campus Row: Archive Query
local_jobs.summary: After Wolf-Winter closes, Blair can either send a fast confidence-labelled warning to road crews or preserve the uncertain route evidence as a traceable field archive. The choice is operational, not a Civic public-versus-protected policy.
local_jobs.objective: Read the surviving maps, clinic notes, and return marks with Blair, then commit one bounded form of road knowledge for Albany's next travelers.
local_jobs.reward: Choose either 2 Capital / Mohawk renown for a 35-minute calibrated warning or 5 renown for a 75-minute traceable archive, with one exclusive 15-minute Campus service after each exact proof.

authored_scene.prompt: Blair has the Wolf-Winter route marks, but not a right to turn uncertainty into certainty. Commit one operational record; neither can be reopened as the other.

options.title: Issue a Calibrated Road Warning
options.preview: Spend 35 minutes sending crews a fast, confidence-labelled warning: useful now, explicit about what the return evidence cannot prove.
options.consequence: Blair marks the warning as operational rather than settled. It earns 2 Capital / Mohawk renown and reserves one 15-minute Campus recovery cot, not a cache or legal certification.

options.title: Prepare a Traceable Field Archive
options.preview: Spend 75 minutes preserving provenance, uncertainty notes, and route marks so the next field team can audit the record.
options.consequence: Blair indexes the uncertain evidence without presenting it as a public finding. It earns 5 Capital / Mohawk renown and reserves one 15-minute Campus resupply cache, not a recovery cot.
